description: Shared service account for legacy monitoring system. MFA bypass required due to system limitations.
compensating_controls: IP allowlisting to internal network only; Enhanced logging on service account; Weekly access review
notes: Remediated June 2025. Monitoring system upgraded to support individual service accounts with MFA.

description: Analytics pipeline uses HTTP between internal microservices within private VPC for performance.
compensating_controls: VPC-only access; No PII in analytics payloads; Network monitoring enabled; Quarterly review
notes: Renewed as EXC-2025-006. TLS implementation planned for Q1 2026 as part of service mesh rollout.

description: Legacy payment gateway cannot be patched for CVE-2024-38812 due to vendor EOL.
compensating_controls: Network isolation; WAF rules; Enhanced IDS monitoring; Vendor migration planned for Q4 2025
review_outcome: Controls effective — vendor migration on track
notes: Renewed as EXC-2025-007. Vendor migration completed November 2025.

description: Emergency change bypass for critical production hotfixes during P1 incidents.
compensating_controls: Post-hoc CAB review within 48 hours; CISO notification within 1 hour; Full documentation required
notes: Standard exception for incident response. Renewed annually.

description: Shared test accounts in staging environment for automated integration testing.
compensating_controls: Staging environment isolated from production; No real customer data; Monthly credential rotation
notes: No production data exposure. Acceptable risk for testing efficiency.

description: Renewal of EXC-2025-002. Analytics HTTP traffic within private VPC.
compensating_controls: Same controls as EXC-2025-002; Service mesh POC started August 2025

description: Renewal of EXC-2025-003. Legacy payment gateway unpatched CVE.
compensating_controls: Same controls plus migration to new vendor in progress
notes: Migration completed November 15, 2025. Exception can be closed at Q1 2026 review.

description: Log retention reduced from 13 months to 6 months for non-production environments due to storage costs.
compensating_controls: Production log retention unchanged at 13 months; Non-prod environments contain no customer data; Alerts still trigger on anomalies
notes: Approved by ISGC during Q3 async review. Cost savings of $45K/year.
